successCriteria.description: src/shared/types/leave.types.ts MUST export a LeaveType string enum with exactly three members: ANNUAL, SICK, EMERGENCY
src/shared/types/leave.types.ts MUST export a LeaveStatus string enum with exactly four members: PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED, CANCELLED
tests/unit/shared/types/leave.types.test.ts MUST exist with Jest tests that verify every enum value in LeaveType (3 values) and LeaveStatus (4 values) is defined
No other files are created or modified in this phase — only the two files above are touched

constraints: Enums must use TypeScript string enum syntax (e.g., ANNUAL = 'ANNUAL') — not numeric enums, not const objects, not union types
The file path must be exactly src/shared/types/leave.types.ts — this is the canonical location referenced by all downstream phases in PLAN.md and ARCHITECTURE.md
Test file must be at tests/unit/shared/types/leave.types.test.ts and use Jest (the declared test framework in HARNESS.json)
No use of `any` type — strict TypeScript (per HARNESS.json constraint no-any)

Any database access, repository pattern usage, audit records, RBAC, or input validation — these are cross-cutting concerns for later phases when modules are built

ambiguities.description: None — the intent is fully specified: exact file paths, exact enum member names, exact test expectations, and explicit "no other files" constraint. Both files already exist and match the specification precisely.
